opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The pain started around my belly button yesterday, but now it's sharp and stuck down in my right side.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain has moved and got a lot worse, I've gone off my food and been sick, and I can barely move — I don't know what's going on and I'm worried.

symptom_narrative.onset: started yesterday, about a day ago
symptom_narrative.duration: around 24 hours, much worse over the last several hours
symptom_narrative.character: began as a vague dull ache around my belly button, now it's a sharp, stabbing pain
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really bad — I can hardly straighten up or move
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: it started near my belly button and has now settled low down on the right side
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant now and steadily getting worse, not coming and going
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really; I took paracetamol and it barely touched it
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: moving, coughing, and the car ride home earlier all made it much worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've completely lost my appetite, I felt sick and threw up once this afternoon, and I've felt hot and a bit feverish since this morning
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: no, I've never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can only walk hunched over holding my side; I live alone and can't really get around like this

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone and relies on public transport, which she feels unable to manage in her current state

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-stated, not measured on a calibrated scale during this encounter

objective_data_offered.value: sitting and walking hunched forward, holding the lower right side of her abdomen, very reluctant to move or straighten up
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: posture observed over video; no examination performed
